plan.title: Posterior Strength & Weighted Intervals
plan.focus: Barbell deadlift foundation followed by a weighted vest and bike conditioning blend.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 3 min Light BikeErg (low resistance)
2 rounds: 10 Cat-Cows, 10 Bird-Dogs, 15 Glute Bridges
2 sets: 5 empty Barbell Deadlifts focusing on hinge movement

sections.name: Strength
exercises: Barbell Deadlift — 5 sets x 5 reps @ moderate weight (rest 120 sec)
Seated Dumbbell Lateral Raises — 3 sets x 15 reps @ 15-20 lbs (rest 60 sec)

sections.name: Conditioning
exercises: EMOM 20 (Every Minute on the Minute for 20 minutes):
Minute 1: 45 seconds BikeErg (High Intensity)
Minute 2: 45 seconds Weighted Vest Walk (Treadmill at 3.0-3.5 mph, 3% incline)
Repeat cycle 10 times total

plan.title: Anterior Strength & BikeErg Intervals
plan.focus: Lower body push and seated vertical press paired with metabolic conditioning

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: Walking Treadmill — 4 min (progressive pace)
Seated Shoulder Circles — 15 reps forward/back
Bodyweight Squats — 15 reps
World's Greatest Stretch — 5 reps per side

sections.name: Strength
exercises: Barbell Back Squat — 4 sets x 8 reps @ moderate weight (rest 90 sec)
Seated Barbell Overhead Press — 3 sets x 10 reps @ moderate weight (rest 60 sec)

sections.name: Conditioning
exercises: BikeErg Interval Circuit — 6 rounds:
1 min High-Intensity Ride (Hard Effort)
1 min DB Goblet Squats (25 lb DB — Continuous Movement)
1 min Full Rest / Slow Pedal

plan.title: Upper Body Push & Weighted Vest Conditioning
plan.focus: Horizontal push strength and steady-state weighted cardio

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 4 min Walking Treadmill (gradual incline increase)
2 rounds: 10 Push-ups, 15 Seated Scapular Retractions using light plates
1 min Dynamic Chest Stretch
1 min Seated Arm Circles

sections.name: Strength
exercises: Barbell Bench Press — 5 sets x 8 reps @ moderate weight (rest 90 sec)
Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press — 3 sets x 12 reps @ 25 lbs (must remain seated for ceiling clearance)
Seated Dumbbell Lateral Raises — 3 sets x 15 reps @ 15 lbs

sections.name: Conditioning
exercises: 20 lb Weighted Vest Power Walk
Treadmill settings: 3.2 - 3.6 mph @ 6.0% incline
Focus on nasal breathing and maintaining an upright posture throughout

plan.title: Lower Body Volume & BikeErg Sprints
plan.focus: Lower hypertrophy focusing on high-volume squats and posterior chain paired with high-intensity bike intervals.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 4 min Walking Treadmill (progressive pace)
2 rounds: 10 Bodyweight Cossack Squats
2 rounds: 15 Hip Bridges (bodyweight)
2 rounds: 10 Bird-Dogs per side
1 min 90/90 Hip Switches

sections.name: Strength (Lower Hypertrophy)
exercises: Barbell Back Squat — 3 sets x 12 reps @ 55-65% 1RM (Rest 90 sec)
Barbell Romanian Deadlift — 3 sets x 12 reps @ moderate weight (Rest 90 sec)
Barbell Hip Thrusts (off bench) — 3 sets x 15 reps (Rest 60 sec)
Dumbbell Goblet Lunges — 2 sets x 12 reps per leg @ 25 lbs (Rest 60 sec)

sections.name: Conditioning (HIIT)
exercises: BikeErg HIIT: 2 min Moderate Pace (Warm-up)
BikeErg HIIT: 12 rounds of 30 sec Sprint (Max Effort) / 45 sec Recovery (Low Cadence)
BikeErg HIIT: 3 min Easy Spin (Cool down)

plan.title: Lower Body Hypertrophy and Incline Power Intervals
plan.focus: High-volume anterior-chain hypertrophy paired with weighted incline HIIT.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: Walking Treadmill — 4 min (gradual pace increase to brisk walk)
Alternating Reverse Lunges (Bodyweight) — 15 reps total
Seated Leg Extensions (on bench, bodyweight squeeze) — 20 reps
Ankle Rotations and Calf Stretches — 2 min

sections.name: Strength (Hypertrophy Focus)
exercises: Barbell Front Squats — 4 sets x 12 reps @ moderate weight (Rest 90s between sets, 3 min before next movement)
DB Bulgarian Split Squats — 3 sets x 15 reps per leg @ 25 lb DBs (Rest 90s between sets, 3 min before next movement)

sections.name: Conditioning (HIIT)
exercises: Weighted Vest Incline Intervals (Wear 20 lb vest) — 10 rounds: 45s Power Walk at 10% incline / 45s Slow Walk at 0% incline
BikeErg Cool Down — 5 min (low resistance, HR descending below 120 bpm)
Seated Quad and Hamstring Stretch — 2 min

plan.title: Lower Body Hypertrophy & Engine Build
plan.focus: High-volume barbell leg work paired with a weighted-vest and BikeErg metcon.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 3 min BikeErg (Low resistance, Zone 1 pace)
2 rounds: 15 Glute Bridges, 10 Bird-Dogs per side, 20 Dead Bugs (slow and controlled)
1 round: 10 Empty Barbell Squats, 10 Empty Barbell Good Mornings

sections.name: Strength
exercises: Barbell Back Squat — 4 sets x 12 reps @ 135-185 lbs or ~60% 1RM (Rest 90s between sets, 3 min before next movement)
Barbell Romanian Deadlift — 3 sets x 12 reps @ 135-155 lbs (Rest 90s between sets, 3 min before next movement)

sections.name: Conditioning & Core
exercises: 16-Minute AMRAP (As Many Rounds As Possible):
15 Calories BikeErg (High Intensity)
12 DB Goblet Squats @ 50 lb DB
20 Alternating Reverse Lunges (Wear 20 lb Weighted Vest)
20 Weighted Russian Twists @ 25 lb DB
15 Hollow Rocks
Rest 60s between AMRAP rounds to maintain power output (Rest 3 min after total time expires)

plan.title: Saturday Mixed-Modality Zone 2 & Core
plan.focus: Low-intensity steady-state cardio (LISS) with a weighted vest and BikeErg to maintain HR 120-140 bpm.

sections.name: Warm-Up & Movement Prep
exercises: 4 min Walking Treadmill (gradual pace increase to brisk walk)
2 rounds: 10 Floor T-Spine Rotations/side, 15 Bird-Dogs, 15 Glute Bridges
1 min Seated Hamstring Stretch

sections.name: Zone 2 Cardio Block 1: Weighted Vest Walk
exercises: 20 min Continuous Walk with 20 lb Weighted Vest (Treadmill 2-3% incline or Outdoors)
Maintain heart rate between 120-130 bpm
Rest 2 min between movements (remove vest, transition to BikeErg)

sections.name: Zone 2 Cardio Block 2: BikeErg
exercises: 25 min Sustained BikeErg (Dampener setting 3-5)
Target heart rate 130-140 bpm; steady cadence of 80-90 RPM
Rest 2 min before core finisher

sections.name: Core Finisher & Mobility
exercises: 3 rounds: 30s Forearm Plank, 15 Seated Knee Tucks (on bench), 15 Dead Bugs
Rest 30s between sets
Pigeon Pose — 1 min per side

plan.title: Monday Heavy Lower: Squat Strength & Metabolic Power
plan.focus: Building maximal strength in the back squat followed by a high-intensity core and lower body metcon.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 4 min Walking Treadmill (gradual incline to 3.0%)
2 rounds: 10 Bodyweight Squats (slow tempo), 15 Hollow Rocks, 20 Mountain Climbers
1 round: 10 Empty Barbell Squats, 10 Empty Barbell Good Mornings
2 min Ankle and Hip Mobilization (Pigeon stretch and deep squat hold)

sections.name: Strength
exercises: Barbell Back Squat — 5 sets x 5 reps @ 75-85% effort (Heavier than previous 12-rep session)
Rest 90s between sets, 3 min before conditioning

sections.name: Conditioning (Metcon)
exercises: 15-Minute AMRAP (As Many Rounds As Possible):
15 Calorie BikeErg
12 Goblet Squats (50 lb DB)
15 Butterfly Sit-ups (Ab-focused)
9 Burpees over the Dumbbell
Rest 2 min after completion of AMRAP

sections.name: Cool Down / Accessory Finish
exercises: 3 sets x 30 second Plank (Weighted with 20 lb vest if possible)
Rest 60s between planks
2 min Quad and Glute stretching

plan.title: Heavy Lower: Linear Strength & Weighted Engine
plan.focus: Maximal squat strength (5x5) followed by a weighted vest metabolic conditioning circuit.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 3 min Walking Treadmill (brisk pace, 3.0 - 3.5 mph)
2 rounds: 10 90/90 Hip Switches, 15 Plank Shoulder Taps, 10 World's Greatest Stretch per side
2 rounds: 10 Empty Barbell Squats (3-sec descent), 10 Barbell Good Mornings (Empty Bar)

sections.name: Strength
exercises: Barbell Back Squat — 5 sets x 5 reps @ 75-80% 1RM (Heavy load, maintaining form)
Rest 90s between sets, 3 min before next movement

sections.name: Conditioning (Metcon)
exercises: Wear 20 lb Weighted Vest for the entire AMRAP
15-Minute AMRAP (As Many Rounds As Possible):
15 Calories BikeErg
12 Box Step-ups (Step up to flat bench, alternating legs)
9 DB Goblet Squats (use 50 lb DB)
15 Hanging Leg Raises (or Floor Leg Raises if ceiling is too low to hang)
Rest 90s after AMRAP completion
Finisher: 2 minutes total Plank hold (accumulated time)

plan.title: Tuesday: Upper Push/Pull Strength & Engine
plan.focus: Upper body pressing and pulling volume with high-intensity metabolic core finisher

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 3 min BikeErg (easy pace)
2 rounds: 10 Scapular Pull-ups (on rig), 10 Band-pull-aparts (or reverse flyes with no weight), 10 Cat-Cow stretches
2 min dynamic arm circles and chest openers

sections.name: Strength
exercises: Barbell Flat Bench Press: 4 sets x 8 reps @ 65-70% 1RM (Rest 90s between sets, 2 min before next movement)
Single-Arm DB Row (using 50 lb DB): 4 sets x 10 reps per side (Rest 90s between sets, 2 min before next movement)
Seated DB Overhead Press (on bench): 3 sets x 12 reps @ 25 lb pair (Rest 90s between sets)

sections.name: Conditioning
exercises: 15-minute AMRAP: 10 Burpees, 15 BikeErg Calories, 10 Weighted Vest Push-ups, 20 Russian Twists (using 25 lb DB), 10 Dumbbell Renegade Rows (using 35 lb DB)

sections.name: Finisher
exercises: 3 rounds (not for time): 30 second Plank, 15 V-ups, 15 Superman extensions (Rest 60s between rounds)

plan.title: Tuesday: Upper Push/Pull Strength & Engine
plan.focus: Upper body pressing and pulling strength with a focus on vertical push/pull mechanics and a high-intensity conditioning finish.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 3 min BikeErg (easy pace)
2 rounds: 10 seated floor press (no weight), 10 DB prone reverse flyes (25 lb pair), 15 hollow rocks, 1 min cat-cow stretch

sections.name: Strength
exercises: Seated DB Shoulder Press (on bench): 4 sets x 8 reps @ 35 lb DBs (Rest 90s between sets, 2 min before next movement)
Barbell Bent-Over Row: 4 sets x 8 reps @ 135-155 lbs (Rest 90s between sets, 2 min before next movement)
Single-Arm DB Row (on bench): 3 sets x 10 reps per side @ 50 lb DB (Rest 90s between sets)

sections.name: Conditioning
exercises: EMOM 20 Minutes: Min 1: 12 BikeErg Calories, Min 2: 15 Burpees, Min 3: 20 Weighted Russian Twists (using 25 lb DB), Min 4: 15 DB Floor Press (using 25 lb pair), Min 5: Rest

plan.title: Upper Body Push/Pull: Horizontal Focus
plan.focus: Heavy barbell bench press paired with heavy single-arm rows and a power-based metcon.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 3 min BikeErg (moderate pace)
2 rounds: 15 Scapular Push-ups, 10 Yoga Push-ups, 15 Superman extensions, 20 Hollow Rocks
1 round: 10 Empty Barbell Bench Press (slow tempo), 10 Empty Barbell Rows

sections.name: Strength
exercises: Barbell Flat Bench Press: 5 sets x 5 reps @ 155-185 lbs (Rest 90s between sets, 3 min before next movement)
Single-Arm DB Row: 4 sets x 10 reps @ 50 lb DB (Rest 90s between sets, 3 min before next movement)

sections.name: Conditioning
exercises: 12-Minute AMRAP (As Many Rounds As Possible):
20 Double-unders (or 40 Single-unders)
10 DB Snatches (35 lb DB - alternate arms, catch at shoulder due to low ceiling)
5 Barbell Power Cleans (115 lbs)
15 V-ups
Rest 90s between rounds is NOT applicable for AMRAP; move consistently.

sections.name: Cool Down & Core Finisher
exercises: 2 min Plank Hold
1 min Doorway Chest Stretch
2 min Puppy Pose (Shoulder/Upper Back Stretch)

plan.title: Wednesday Zone 2 Aerobic Capacity
plan.focus: Sustained aerobic conditioning maintaining a heart rate of 120-140 bpm, utilizing varied modalities to build cardiovascular endurance without high-intensity spikes.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 5 min light BikeErg (easy pace, nasal breathing)
2 min Cat-Cow and bird-dog sequence
3 min light treadmill walk (flat, 3.0 mph)

sections.name: Sustained Zone 2 Cardio
exercises: 15 min BikeErg (steady cadence, 120-140 bpm HR)
15 min Weighted Vest Walk (treadmill, 3.2 mph, 20 lb vest)
10 min outdoor brisk walking (no vest, nose-breathing focus)

sections.name: Core & Cool Down
exercises: 3 sets of: 45-second plank hold, 15 V-ups, 20 Russian twists (no weight)
5 min static stretching: child's pose, pigeon stretch, and seated hamstring stretch

plan.title: Heavy Upper: Maximal Strength & Vested Stamina
plan.focus: High-intensity bench press followed by a vested CrossFit-style AMRAP focusing on vertical pressing and core stability.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 3 min BikeErg (easy pace, nasal breathing)
2 rounds: 12 Dead Bugs (controlled)
2 rounds: 10 Yoga Push-ups
2 rounds: 15 DB Reverse Flyes (25 lb pair)
2 rounds: 10 Scapular Pull-ups (from squat rig)

sections.name: Strength
exercises: Barbell Flat Bench Press: 5 sets x 3 reps @ 80-85% 1RM (Heavy). Rest 90s between sets, 3 min before next movement.
Single-Arm DB Row (50 lb): 4 sets x 10 reps per arm. Rest 90s between sets, 3 min before next movement.

sections.name: Conditioning (Vested)
exercises: Wear 20 lb Weighted Vest for the duration of the AMRAP.
15 Minute AMRAP (As Many Rounds As Possible):
15 Calorie BikeErg
10 Seated Barbell Thrusters (seated on bench, from the rack, 95 lbs)
15 V-Ups
40 Double-unders (or 80 Single-unders)
Rest 3 min after completion of AMRAP.

plan.title: Lower Hypertrophy & Vested Engine
plan.focus: Higher-rep leg volume paired with a vested metcon focusing on posterior chain and midline stability.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 3 min BikeErg at easy pace
2 rounds: 15 Air Squats, 10 Banded Good Mornings (red band), 15 Hollow Rocks, 10 alternating bird-dogs
1 round: 10 Empty Barbell Squats (3-second eccentric/descent)

sections.name: Strength
exercises: Barbell Back Squat: 4 sets x 10 reps @ 135-165 lbs (Rest 90s between sets, 3 min before next movement)
DB Romanian Deadlift (hold 50 lb DB with both hands): 3 sets x 12 reps (Rest 90s between sets, 3 min before conditioning)

sections.name: Conditioning (HIIT)
exercises: Wear 20 lb Weighted Vest for the duration of the workout
15-Minute AMRAP (As Many Rounds As Possible):
15 Calorie BikeErg
12 DB Power Cleans (pair of 25 lb DBs - from floor to shoulder)
20 Walking Lunges (Bodyweight + Vest)
15 V-ups
50 Single-Unders (Jump Rope)

sections.name: Cool Down
exercises: 2 min Puppy Pose (stretch shoulders and spine)
1 min Pigeon Stretch per side

plan.title: Saturday Aerobic Flush: Vested Ruck & Core
plan.focus: Sustained Zone 2 cardio (120-140 bpm) focusing on aerobic endurance and mid-line stability using the weighted vest.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 3 min BikeErg (easy pace, nasal breathing only)
2 rounds: 15 Red Band Pull-aparts
2 rounds: 10 Red Band Face Pulls
2 rounds: 15 Air Squats (controlled tempo)
1 min Cat-Cow stretch

sections.name: Zone 2 Cardio
exercises: Wear 20 lb Weighted Vest for the entire duration.
40 min Sustained Movement: Outdoor walk or Treadmill walk (Flat, 3.2-3.8 mph).
Target Heart Rate: 120-140 bpm. If HR exceeds 140, slow the pace.
Focus on consistent breathing and upright posture under the weight of the vest.

sections.name: Core Finisher
exercises: Remove Weighted Vest before starting.
3 Rounds for Quality:
15 Sit-ups
15 V-ups
20 Russian Twists (bodyweight)
10 Barbell Ab-Wheel Rollouts (kneeling)
Rest 60s between rounds, 2 min before finishing.

plan.title: Heavy Lower: Linear Squat Strength & Posterior Chain Capacity
plan.focus: High-intensity back squats for strength, followed by a posterior-heavy metcon.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 3 min BikeErg (moderate pace)
2 rounds: 15 Red Band Pull-aparts, 10 Red Band Face Pulls, 15 Air Squats, 10 alternating Bird-Dogs
2 rounds: 15 Hollow Rocks, 10 Empty Barbell Squats (3-second pause at bottom)

sections.name: Strength
exercises: Barbell Back Squat: 5 sets x 5 reps @ 185-210 lbs (Rest 90s between sets, 3 min before next movement)
Note: Focus on maintaining a neutral spine and driving through the mid-foot.

sections.name: Conditioning
exercises: 15-Minute AMRAP (As Many Rounds As Possible):
10 Barbell Deadlifts @ 155-185 lbs
20 Calorie BikeErg
15 Step-ups (to bench, bodyweight only)
30 Double Unders (or 60 Single Unders)
15 V-ups (Core staple)
Rest 2 min after completion of AMRAP

plan.title: Upper Body Push/Pull & Midline Stamina
plan.focus: Vertical/horizontal pull strength with seated pressing and a high-intensity snatch-based metcon.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 5 min BikeErg (easy pace, focus on nasal breathing)
2 rounds: 15 Red Band Pull-aparts
2 rounds: 10 Red Band Face Pulls
2 rounds: 12 Dead Bugs (slow and controlled)
1 round: 10 Scapular Push-ups + 10 Cat-Cows

sections.name: Strength
exercises: Barbell Bent Over Row: 4 sets x 10 reps @ 135-155 lbs (Rest 90s between sets, 3 min before next movement)
Seated Barbell Strict Press (Bench at 90 deg): 4 sets x 8 reps @ 95-115 lbs (Rest 90s between sets, 3 min before next movement)

sections.name: Conditioning
exercises: 12 Minute AMRAP (As Many Rounds As Possible):
12 DB Alternating Snatches @ 50 lb (From floor, catch at shoulder due to low ceiling)
20 Bicycle Crunches
40 Double-Unders (or 80 Single-Unders)
10 DB Renegade Rows @ 25 lb pair (5 reps per side, push-up included every rep)
Rest 90s between rounds is not applicable for AMRAP; move consistently. Rest 2 min after completion.

plan.title: Midweek Aerobic Base & Core Development
plan.focus: Sustained Zone 2 cardiovascular conditioning (HR 120-140 bpm) and midline stability.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 3 min BikeErg (easy pace, nasal breathing)
2 rounds: 15 Red Band Pull-aparts
2 rounds: 10 Red Band Dislocates
2 rounds: 12 alternating Bird-Dogs
2 rounds: 15 Cat-Cow stretches

sections.name: Zone 2 Cardio
exercises: 20 min BikeErg (Maintain 120-140 bpm, nasal breathing only)
Rest 2 min to transition to treadmill
18 min Treadmill Walk (Flat, brisk pace 3.5-4.0 mph, maintain 120-140 bpm)

sections.name: Core Finisher
exercises: 3 rounds for quality: 15 V-ups, 30 Flutter Kicks, 20 Bicycle Crunches
Rest 90s between sets

plan.title: Heavy Upper: Bench Capacity & Posterior Pull
plan.focus: Heavy barbell bench press paired with heavy single-arm rows and a high-volume pulling/core metcon.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 3 min BikeErg (easy pace, nasal breathing)
2 rounds: 15 Red Band Pull-aparts
2 rounds: 10 Red Band Dislocates
2 rounds: 20 Russian Twists (controlled bodyweight)
2 rounds: 10 Scapular Push-ups
1 round: 10 Empty Barbell Bench Press (3-second eccentric)

sections.name: Strength
exercises: Barbell Bench Press: 5 sets x 5 reps @ 175-205 lbs (Rest 90s between sets, 3 min before next movement)
Single Arm DB Row (Seated on bench): 4 sets x 10 reps per arm @ 50 lb DB (Rest 90s between sets, 3 min before next movement)

sections.name: Conditioning
exercises: 12-Minute AMRAP (As Many Rounds As Possible):
12 Barbell Sumo Deadlift High Pulls @ 95 lbs
15 V-ups
20 Walking Lunges (Bodyweight)
40 Double-unders (or 80 Single-unders)
Rest 3 min before finisher

sections.name: Core Finisher
exercises: 3 sets: 30 seconds Bicycle Crunches / 30 seconds Hollow Hold (Rest 60s between sets)

plan.title: Lower Hypertrophy & Engine Density
plan.focus: Quad-dominant hypertrophy followed by a high-intensity metcon emphasizing explosive hip power and core stability.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 3 min BikeErg (easy pace, focus on nasal breathing)
2 rounds: 15 Red Banded Rows (focus on scapular retraction)
2 rounds: 10 Red Band Dislocates (seated on bench due to ceiling height)
2 rounds: 10/10 Windshield Wipers (lying on floor, core control)
2 rounds: 15 Bodyweight Air Squats (slow tempo: 3s down, 1s pause)

sections.name: Lower Body Hypertrophy
exercises: Barbell Front Squats: 4 sets x 10 reps @ 135-155 lbs (Rest 90s between sets, 3 min before next movement)
Barbell Bulgarian Split Squats (rear foot on bench): 3 sets x 12 reps per leg @ 65-85 lbs (Rest 90s between sets, 3 min before conditioning)

sections.name: HIIT Conditioning (Metcon)
exercises: AMRAP 14 Minutes (As Many Rounds As Possible):
15 Calorie BikeErg
12 Single-Arm DB Squat Cleans (50 lb DB, alternating arms each rep, catch at shoulder height)
20 Butterfly Sit-ups
40 Double-unders (or 80 Single-unders)
15 Jump Squats (Bodyweight)
Rest 2 min after AMRAP finishes
Finisher: 2 min Max Leg Raises (hanging from squat rig if height allows, otherwise lying floor leg raises)
